name: The only Human in a Furry Highschool
description:
Guess what guys and girls. Its finally fucking here. Im really glad the my (as of right now) 15 viewers didnt come to my freaking house and throw bricks at my windows

.

.

.

Okay imma be real with yall. Im going through some shit guys. Like my past suddenly came screaming back when i got all caught up with an old freind recently. My ADHD and ADD brain are telling me to idk. Scrap, i guess. My random perfectionist mind is telling me to go back rip apart everything and start over, but what good would that do? (Also how i be lookin rn)

BUT! DESPITE MY CURRENT CONDITION! im very greatful for finding my people on this site, people who get it you know. Soo that being said im gonna release a bot series too. Let me know if you want me to get pictures for this bot aswell.

Updated: i cut off most of the initial message, just because it was a yappathon, like when tour mom finds sombody they haven't seen in a while in the middle of a grocery store. So if you want to see the orginal story, i got this google doc.
creator: Unamused_Kirby
